description.short: Generates professional bios of meeting participants for better engagement.
description.full: Generates short, professional bios of meeting participants so leaders quickly understand others' background, role, and expertise before meetings, leading to better engagement and trust.

localizationKeys.agentDescription: Executive Helper is a declarative agent that automates meeting preparation by researching public information about participants and generating comprehensive executive bios with career insights.
localizationKeys.agentCSText1: I am preparing for a first-time introduction with Michael Chen, CFO of Microsoft Asia. Provide a short profile and five rapport-building questions.
localizationKeys.agentCSText2: I have a strategic meeting next week with the CEO of Contoso. Help me prepare by creating a comprehensive bio.
localizationKeys.agentCSText3: Create a bio for Jane Smith, VP of Engineering at Fabrikam.
localizationKeys.agentCSText4: I'm attending a networking event and will meet several executives. Start with a bio for the keynote speaker.
localizationKeys.agentCSText5: I have an advisory board meeting coming up. Help me understand the background of our new board member.
localizationKeys.agentCSText6: I have a meeting with John Doe, Senior Product Manager. What can you tell me about his background and expertise?
